mapper.insert: INSERT INTO parking_space (parking_lot_id, area_id, space_number, space_type, status, is_monthly, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{parkingLotId}, #{areaId}, #{spaceNumber}, #{spaceType}, #{status}, #{isMonthly}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO parking_space (parking_lot_id, area_id, space_number, space_type, status, is_monthly, created_at, updated_at) VALUES
(#{item.parkingLotId}, #{item.areaId}, #{item.spaceNumber}, #{item.spaceType}, #{item.status}, #{item.isMonthly}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update:
UPDATE parking_space
area_id = #{dto.areaId},
space_number = #{dto.spaceNumber},
space_type = #{dto.spaceType},
status = #{dto.status},
is_monthly = #{dto.isMonthly},
updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
